title: Pastel Purple Balloons, 50Pcs 12 Inch Macaron Baby Purple Pale Lavender Lilac Latex Balloon Arch Garland Kit Girl Kid Birthday Wedding Anniversary Engagement Baby Shower Party Decorations
features: 50 Pieces Pastel Purple Balloons: Elevate your gathering to new levels with our remarkable balloon set. This party balloon set includes 50 pieces 12 inch latex macaron purple balloons and 1 piece ribbon. The vibrant macaron purple will create a stunning visual impact that will make your party stand out. Designed to retain their shape and color for a long time, these macaron purple latex balloons will provide an impressive display for your event

Multiple Applications: The 50pcs balloon set is versatile and perfect for many occasions. From wedding, birthday, engagement, bridal shower, baby shower, bachelorette party, gender reveal to anniversary, theme party, retirement, proposal, new Year Eve, Valentine's Day, Halloween, Christmas, graduation, holiday celebration and more. They provide you and your valued guests with the photo backdrop to capture beautiful memories

Supports Air and Helium: Latex balloons filled with air will stay full for up to 72 hours, while helium will stay full for 3-6 hours. For optimal flotation, inflate 1-2 hours before your event. To prevent the balloon from bursting, be careful not to over-inflate it, 85% is enough

Party Balloons: You can enjoy a carefree party with your family. You can also match it with other colors to create the party atmosphere you want. Please note that it is normal for 1 to 3 balloons in 50 pieces to have holes or bursts

Spending DIY Time Together: You can use our balloon set to decorate the party with your spouse, children and friends. These balloons are suitable for suitable for decoration anywhere, such as living room, garden, swimming pool, porch, dining table, etc. You can hang these balloons in the air or affix them to doors, walls, ceilings, headboards, doorways and anywhere else you want to decorate. You can also string them together to make any shape you want
description: 50Pcs Pastel Purple Balloon Set 12 inch pastel purple balloon *50 balloon ribbon *1 Suitable For Any Occasion The colors in these balloons will create a stunning visual feast for you and your guests. No matter how you DIY it, it will make your activities full of vitality, joy and endless fun. Whether it's a birthday party, wedding, or holiday celebration, they're the perfect addition to any event. They are also suitable for baby showers, bridal showers, gender reveals, graduations, proposals, engagements, anniversaries, retirements, baptisms, Halloween, engagements, New Years, Thanksgiving, Christmas and more Kind Tips: ·Do Not Over Inflate: It is normal for 1-2 balloons to break out of every 50 balloons. To avoid balloon breaking, be careful not to over-inflate, 85% is ok. ·Do not expose the balloon to high temperature, avoid friction, impact and contact with sharp objects to cause the balloon to burst.
